headline: IFF Declares Dividend for First Quarter 2026
summary: NEW YORK, March 04, 2026--IFF (NYSE: IFF) announced that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per share of its common stock, payable on April 10, 2026 to shareholders of record as of March 20, 2026.
